title: Animated Flags
description: Animated Flags is a Fabric mod that adds decorative animated flags to Minecraft. Display your favorite country's flag or use solid color flags for decoration. Each flag waves realistically in the wind with smooth 30-frame animations.

## **🏳️ Animated Flags** 

Is a Fabric mod that adds decorative animated flags to Minecraft. Display your favorite country's flag or use solid color flags for decoration. Each flag waves realistically in the wind with smooth 30-frame animations.

## **✨ Features**

30 Animated Flags - Smooth waving animation with 30 frames
25 Country Flags - USA, UK, Japan, Germany, France, Brazil, and more
5 Solid Color Flags - Black, Blue, Green, Red, White
Easy Crafting - Simple recipe using sticks and wool
Flag Selector GUI - Easily browse and choose your flag
Stackable Poles - Build flag poles of any height

## **🌍 Included Countries**

USA, Germany, Andorra, Argentina, Australia, Austria, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Chile, China, Colombia, Egypt, France, India, Japan, Mexico, New Zealand, Nigeria, Russia, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, United Kingdom, Venezuela

## **🔨 How to Use**


Craft a Flag Selector using 3 sticks + 6 white wool
Right-click with the Flag Selector to open the selection GUI
Choose your flag from Colors or Countries categories
Place your flag on top of Flag Pole blocks

## **💬 Help me to expand the Mod!**

Which flag would you like to see next? or maybe teams? based on your feedback I can update the mod.

## **⭐ Check Out My Other Mods!**

Visit my Stardusk Mods profile to discover more lore-friendly mods for your Minecraft experience! All my mods are designed to blend seamlessly with vanilla gameplay.
